description_long: This is a modern electric scooter with a sleek, matte black frame and red accent cables running along the stem and deck. The scooter features a straight, vertical handlebar stem with a T-bar handle, and two solid wheels—one at the front and one at the rear. The deck is long and narrow, with a textured, grippy surface for secure footing, and a small kickstand is attached near the rear wheel. The front wheel is slightly larger and encased in a protective fender, while the rear wheel has a visible brake mechanism. The overall design is minimalist and urban, suitable for personal transportation in city environments.
description: A sleek, matte black electric scooter with red accent cables, a T-bar handle, and a long, grippy deck. It features two solid wheels and a minimalist, urban design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the T-bar handle, front wheel with fender, and the full length of the deck.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the rear wheel, kickstand, and the textured deck surface.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the rear wheel, brake mechanism, and the red cable routing.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the handlebar stem, front wheel, and the overall slim profile.
attribute_deck_design: long, narrow, and textured with a grippy surface
